user.title: Connect to NodePulse
user.description: Enter the URL of your NodePulse addon. When running as a Home Assistant addon, leave blank or use http://a0d7b954-nodepulse:8099 — the integration will auto-discover the correct address.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the NodePulse addon. Make sure the addon is running and the URL is correct.

abort.already_configured: This NodePulse addon is already configured.
